name: metal dormitory
hints: A dormitory with rows of sleeping platforms. This was crew quarters for multiple beings.
Search the platforms carefully - LOOK PLATFORMS or FEEL PLATFORMS. Something may be hidden among them.
EAST returns to the main corridor, WEST leads to the lavatory/mess hall area. Check under or behind the platforms.
notes: Crew dormitory with multiple sleeping platforms. East leads to main corridor (room 21), west to the lavatory/mess hall (room 27). The platforms may hide items if searched carefully.
